_comment_doc: Sunfish main-branch ruleset, modeled with GitHub's Rulesets API (POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/rulesets). This is the recommended modern replacement for the legacy branch-protection rule in branch-protection-main.json. See infra/github/README.md for when to use which. The leading _comment_* keys are stripped by apply-main-ruleset.sh before POST/PATCH (the GitHub API rejects unknown top-level fields).
_comment_paths_ignore_hazard: GitHub Rulesets, like legacy branch protection, will leave a required check in 'Pending' if the workflow is skipped (paths/paths-ignore filter, branches filter, commit-message skip, etc.). Of the 7 required contexts below, the 4 prefixed [global-ux] live in .github/workflows/global-ux-gate.yml which is path-filtered to packages/, apps/, tooling/, i18n/. A docs-only PR will skip them and be permanently blocked. Mitigations documented in README.md §'Paths-ignore hazard'.
name: main-protection
